msg-inprogress-1.headerTitle: Your order is on the way!
msg-inprogress-1.headerSubtitle: Your order will arrive soon. Please have your delivery code ready for the agent.

msg-delivered-1.headerSubtitle: Thank you for your purchase. We hope you enjoy your new Modern Chair!

msg-returned-1.headerSubtitle: We have received your return request for the Modern Chair. It should be processed within 3-5 business days.

msg-canceled-1.headerSubtitle: Your order for the Modern Chair has been canceled. If this was a mistake, please contact support.
